summary: Verified reset-section fix on AdminHomepage.jsx. resetSection() no longer triggers window.confirm; it now deep-clones defaults into state and shows a success toast. End-to-end flow (edit -> save -> reload homepage -> reset -> save -> reload homepage) works correctly with cache-busted URLs.
passed: Admin -> Homepage tab -> Atelier section expands and hp-atelier-headline is present
Edited hp-atelier-headline to 'TEST_RESET_2' and saved; 'Homepage saved' toast appeared
Homepage (/) reloaded with cache-bust and correctly showed 'TEST_RESET_2'
Clicking 'Reset section to defaults' did NOT trigger window.confirm dialog (dialog_fired=False)
Immediately after reset click, hp-atelier-headline input value = 'Where glass is a family heirloom.' (matches default)
After Save + homepage reload, homepage shows default headline 'Where glass is a family heirloom.' and no longer shows 'TEST_RESET_2'
notes: Served bundle: https://product-showcase-859.preview.emergentagent.com/static/js/bundle.js. Cache-bust query params used on both /admin and / navigations. No console errors. Note: ?tab=homepage query param does not auto-switch tab in Admin — test clicks the Homepage tab explicitly (not a regression, just an observation).
